title: selaginella goudotiana
intro: Selaginella goudotiana, also known as the resinous spike moss or Java spikemoss, is a species of flowering plant in the family Selaginellaceae, characterized by its small, spiky spikes and ability to thrive in a variety of environments. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, making it effective in treating wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Selaginella goudotiana include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of bronchitis and pneumonia, as well as its potential to exhibit antioxidant and antimicrobial activities. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant is prepared through infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which are used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
